title: No Kings Rally — Cleveland
location: The Free Stamp, Willard Park, Cleveland, OH
description: Stand with us at the No Kings rally. Democracy is not negotiable — show up and make your voice heard.
descriptionEs: Acompanos en la concentracion No Kings. La democracia no es negociable — ven y haz escuchar tu voz.

title: Food Distribution with The People's Distro
location: New Era Clubhouse, 11713 Buckeye Rd, Cleveland, OH 44120
description: Join Cortney and The People's Distro for a community food distribution. Come help serve your neighbors and connect with the campaign.
descriptionEs: Unete a Cortney y The People's Distro para una distribucion comunitaria de alimentos. Ven a servir a tus vecinos y conectarte con la campana.

title: Fast for Peace through Justice — Kickoff Speech
description: Cortney delivered the kickoff speech at the Fast for Peace through Justice event.
descriptionEs: Cortney pronuncio el discurso inaugural en el evento Ayuno por la Paz a traves de la Justicia.

title: Coffee & Conversation — Phoenix Coffee Coventry
location: Phoenix Coffee Coventry, Cleveland Heights, OH
description: Casual meet and greet with Cortney at Phoenix Coffee.
descriptionEs: Encuentro casual con Cortney en Phoenix Coffee.

title: St. Patrick's Day Celebration — Signature Collection
description: Signature collection at Cleveland's St. Patrick's Day celebration.
descriptionEs: Recoleccion de firmas en la celebracion del Dia de San Patricio en Cleveland.

title: Ohio Cannabis Final Farmers Market
description: Campaign presence at the Ohio Cannabis Final Farmers Market.
descriptionEs: Presencia de la campana en el Ohio Cannabis Final Farmers Market.

title: National Day of Action: Stop the War on Iran — Rally at Market Square
description: Rally against the war on Iran. National Day of Action.
descriptionEs: Concentracion contra la guerra en Iran. Dia Nacional de Accion.

title: Food Distribution with The People's Distro
description: Monthly community food distribution with The People's Distro.
descriptionEs: Distribucion mensual de alimentos comunitarios con The People's Distro.

title: Spoke in Opposition of Senate Bill 87 — Ohio Statehouse
description: Cortney spoke in opposition to Senate Bill 87 at the Ohio Statehouse.
descriptionEs: Cortney hablo en oposicion al Proyecto de Ley del Senado 87 en la Asamblea Legislativa de Ohio.

title: CLE: Stand with Minnesota — ICE OUT! National Day of Action & Rally
description: National Day of Action rally at Public Square — ICE OUT, Stand with Minnesota.
descriptionEs: Concentracion del Dia Nacional de Accion en Public Square — ICE FUERA, Solidaridad con Minnesota.
